query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `partner_config` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`configKey` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`configValue` text NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	`updatedBy` int,
	CONSTRAINT `partner_config_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `partner_config_configKey_unique` UNIQUE(`configKey`)
);
ALTER TABLE `orders` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `partnerBenefitAmount` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE `orders` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `partnerSubscriptionId` int
